TC-M02-004,"Module 02","M02-F02","Auto Rating Suggestion","Auto Rating Suggestion Triggered After Typing Notes","Verify that the system suggests a performance rating (G, S, or NI) approximately 400ms after user stops typing notes.","Staff user is logged in.","Subject=IT

TC-M02-015,"Module 02","M02-F09","Concurrent Edit Handling","Three-Way Merge - Non-conflicting Concurrent Edits","Verify that when two staff members edit different subjects on the same observation record simultaneously, changes are merged.","Staff Teacher A and Teacher B are logged in. 2. Teacher B opens ST001 edit form
3. Teacher B updates IT Comment to 'Excellent performance' and clicks Save first

4. Teacher A updates English Comment to 'Good English speaking' (keeping IT comment original) and clicks Save","Three-way merge is successful. Saved record has IT Comment 'Excellent performance' and English Comment 'Good English speaking'. Teacher A receives warning: ""Saved, but some fields were updated by another teacher.""","High","Related Requirement: M02-F09, Scenario: SC-10, Three-Way Merge"

TC-M02-016,"Module 02","M02-F09","Concurrent Edit Handling","Three-Way Merge - Conflicting Concurrent Edits","Verify that when two staff members edit the same field of an observation record simultaneously, the system flags a conflict and alerts the user.","Teacher A and Teacher B are logged in. 2. Teacher B opens ST001 edit form
3. Teacher B updates IT Comment to 'Excellent performance' and clicks Save

4. Teacher A updates IT Comment to 'Very good performance' and clicks Save after Teacher B","Teacher A's save triggers a conflict warning. The system flags that the IT Comment field has a conflict.
